Dec 2, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Rohit Sharma showcased top-level fitness and form in the recent Ranchi ODI, reinforcing his importance to the Indian lineup.

Rohit’s performance in Ranchi confirms his readiness for upcoming matches and his continued role as a fitness benchmark for the team.
